reasoning: The market probability was around 4% on February 9, 2026 when the BTC price was hovering around $68,000. As of February 15, we've seen a drop to 'near $60,000' followed by a rebound back above $70,000. The target probability of the price dropping down to $45,000 relies on an approximate 35% drop within the final 13 days of the month. BTC has high liquidity on the BTC/USDT Binance pair, meaning a pure flash crash localized to that market is highly improbable (unlike the recent one on the much less liquid BTC/USD1 pair). With the price having recovered to $70,000 and 6 more days having safely elapsed without hitting the target since the 4% market estimate, the true probability is naturally lower, around 2-3%.
